text: 【原初の闇】撃破

/atime1.0 /voice11_voice_delicious_npcha_012 なんと禍々しい。
これが、彼者の真の姿……

/voice11_voice_delicious_npcha_014 ここからが、本番のようです。
最後まで、油断せずに！

/voice11_voice_delicious_npchi_012 絶対に負けない！
このまま押し切ろう！

/voice11_voice_delicious_npcma_012 あなた一人に
背負わせたりなんかさせない！
私も、一緒に戦う！
/voice11_voice_delicious_npcma_013 クラリッサ！　あの人を守って！
/voice11_voice_delicious_npchi_013 天叢雲、あの人を助けて！

守護輝士！
/voice11_voice_delicious_npcma_016 今だよ！　とどめを！
/voice11_voice_delicious_npchi_014 いっけえええええ！
/voice11_voice_delicious_npcha_016 守護輝士、今です！
/voice11_voice_delicious_npcma_014 決着をつけるよ！

/atime1.0 /voice11_voice_delicious_npcha_012 This ominous aura.
So, this is its true form....

/voice11_voice_delicious_npcha_014 Seems it's about to get serious.
Don’t let your guard down!
Not even for a second!

/voice11_voice_delicious_npchi_012 We can't lose!
Let's see this through!

this all on your own!
I’ll fight alongside you!
